docs.name: Data Table
docs.description: Configurable data table with optional column freeze (left/right), customizable header and body colors and backgrounds, optional borders, and optional sortable columns.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions: key, label, and optional sortKey for sortable columns.

props.name: data
props.description: Row data; each row is an object keyed by column key.

props.name: freezeColumns
props.description: Which columns to freeze when horizontally scrolling: none, left, right, or both sides.

props.name: freezeCount
props.description: Legacy fallback count used only when freezeLeftCount or freezeRightCount are not provided.

props.name: freezeLeftCount
props.description: How many columns to freeze on the left when freezeColumns is "left" or "both".

props.name: freezeRightCount
props.description: How many columns to freeze on the right when freezeColumns is "right" or "both".

props.name: paginated
props.description: Enable built-in pagination controls.

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Number of rows per page when paginated is true.

props.name: pageSizeOptions
props.description: Optional list of page sizes to show in a selector.

props.name: initialPage
props.description: Initial page index (1-based) when paginated is true.

props.name: onPageChange
props.description: Called when the current page or page size changes.

props.name: paginationPreviousLabel
props.description: Previous-page control content; defaults to a left chevron icon.

props.name: paginationNextLabel
props.description: Next-page control content; defaults to a right chevron icon.

props.name: getRowKey
props.description: Optional stable key per row for React reconciliation (sort, pagination). Defaults to row.id / row.key when string or number, else a generated key.

props.name: headerTextColor
props.description: Tailwind class for header text, e.g. text-neutral-900.

props.name: bodyTextColor
props.description: Tailwind class for body cell text.

props.name: headerBackground
props.description: Tailwind class for header background, e.g. bg-neutral-100.

props.name: bodyBackground
props.description: Tailwind class for body background.

props.name: border
props.description: Whether to show table and cell borders.

props.name: sortable
props.description: Whether column headers with sortKey are clickable to sort.

props.name: onSort
props.description: Callback when sort changes (for controlled use).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the root wrapper.

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme for default header/body colors when not overridden.

variants.label: Default
Freeze left
Freeze right
Freeze both
Bordered
Sortable
Custom colors
Full options

docs.overview: DataTable renders a fully-featured table with optional client-side sorting, pagination with configurable page sizes, and sticky column freezing on the left and/or right edges. Theming and all colour tokens are customisable.

scenarios.title: Sortable team roster
scenarios.description: Display a team list with column-level sorting so managers can quickly find members by name or role.

scenarios.title: Paginated transaction log
scenarios.description: Handle large datasets with pagination by using paginated, pageSize, and pageSizeOptions props.
